scroll_found.title: Research the Drowned World scroll at a Research Pedestal

drowned_city.title: Locate the Gates of the Drowned City (Aquamirae — deep ocean structure, massive and dangerous)

subtitle.text: The Gates of the Drowned City are Aquamirae's deepest structure. Do not enter alone.

description: ▸ Aquamirae adds a deep ocean civilization
└ Mob types: Eel (fast, electric), Orca (pack hunter),
└ The Drowned World scroll drops from
the inner chamber chests of the Gates
└ ✓ Night Vision: the deep ocean is dark
└ ✓ Full enchanted armor: the Orca deals high damage
└ ✓ Fire Resistance: some deep mobs have thermal attacks
└ Found in: Gates of the Drowned City inner chambers,
deep ocean ruin chests (rare), drowned mob drops
▸ The scroll was written by the last member
of the civilization that built the Gates.
They sealed it in a waterproof case.
They left it in the outer hall.
They did not leave through the outer hall.
▶ Locate the Gates of the Drowned City [check]
◇ The Drowned World scroll mentions the Eye of the Drowned.
One of the custom End Remastered eyes.
